When I'm feeling real meaningless, I go on walks down the park.
Understandable. Sometimes taking a walk in a forest or wood trails are refreshing for my mind. It’s different for everyone thou~
Nice mental reset and some shut eye from screen
What do you in ur free time?
I get that, you can just close your eyes and walk forward feeling time pass
Like finding a oshi to support

Yep. You can feel wind, hear trees rustling, sometimes animals or people walking towards you. Most of the time, silence, and surrounded by nature. It’s a tranquil feeling that is unique to that “world”. Everywhere else is bustling with people, transportations, chatter, noises. No time to enjoy any form of silence, and constantly needing to lookout for everything.
By supporting you mean like helping them out in irl stuff through vents and stuff?
There's always ppl in the park. But it's quiet enough

When looking at a screen, you are either hearing something or watching something. Texting someone or calling someone. 

In the forest, there is nothing but you and nature.
Yeah I understand what ur talking abt rn
We should do something for it
should I continue pulling blue or should I switch to wheels?
No more blue but you might want more characters since endgame mode requires at least 5 teams (19 units)
